allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.platformio" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Python" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name)
PowerShell($port = [System.IO.Ports.SerialPort]::new\("COM6"\); try { $port.Open\(\); Write-Host "COM6 is free"; $port.Close\(\) } catch { Write-Host "COM6 is busy: $_" })
